articles.author: Lorne Cook, Justin Spike, Karel Janicek
articles.title: EU approves a $106B loan package to help Ukraine after Hungary lifts its veto - AP News
articles.description: The European Union has approved a 90-billion-euro ($106-billion) loan package to help Ukraine meet its economic and military needs for the next two years. The decision on Thursday came after Russian oil began flowing again to Hungary and Slovakia through a ke…
articles.content: BRUSSELS (AP) The European Union on Thursday approved a 90-billion-euro ($106-billion) loan package to help Ukraine meet its economic and military needs for two years after oil began flowing through … [+4839 chars]
